# Florentine Histories

*[Machiavelli](../philosophers/machiavelli.md) · 1525 · *Istorie fiorentine**

A history of Florence commissioned by Cardinal Giulio de' Medici, the future Pope Clement VII: [Machiavelli](../philosophers/machiavelli.md) applies his reading of civil conflict and the corruption of cities, showing how Florence's discords, left unregulated, weakened the Republic instead of strengthening it as at Rome.
